title: lichen_lora_l2_tx missing initialized check
description:
lora_l2.c:371 checks running but not initialized before accessing lora_state.lora_dev at line 378.

What goes wrong: If init() fails (returns error but sets running=0), a later tx() call passes the running check (still 0, so returns -ENETDOWN). However, if code is restructured or a race occurs where running is set before init completes, tx() could use uninitialized lora_dev (NULL dereference or garbage pointer).

Current code is safe because start() checks initialized and sets running. But this is an implicit invariant - a future refactor could break it.

Fix: Add initialized check at lora_l2.c:371 alongside the running check for defense-in-depth.
close_reason: Fixed: Added initialized check at line 379 with defense-in-depth comment explaining the invariant
